evals.prompt: 帮我 review 最近三次提交，并生成 HTML 报告。
evals.expected_output: Outputs a P0/P1/P2 review in chat and generates a .code-reviews/*.json + .html report for HEAD~3..HEAD via the deterministic runner.

evals.prompt: review staged，重点关注 P0，给出可直接应用的修复代码片段。
evals.expected_output: Reviews only staged diff (git diff --cached). Reports only concrete issues in changed code, prioritizing P0 findings with actionable fix_code.

evals.prompt: security review last 1 commit，并指出是否存在 key 泄露、请求签名绕过、或不安全的日志输出。
evals.expected_output: Applies security lens, reports only P0/P1 security findings for HEAD~1..HEAD, avoids style/naming nits.
